summary: Rewrote root README.md from a 227-line CLI-focused doc into a ~150-line GitHub-first landing page. Portable kit is the primary entry; Python CLI is documented as optional. Includes Mermaid diagram, 60-second quickstart, safety model, and roadmap.

files_changed.summary: Complete rewrite to GitHub landing page

risks.description: README claims must match actual kit behavior. If kit changes, README may drift.
risks.recommended_review: Keep README in mind during future kit changes.

open_questions: Should a future round add screenshots or GIFs to the README for visual appeal?
